# Summary


# Type

- [ ] daily note
- [ ] docs update
- [ ] example notification
- [ ] state format
- [ ] redaction or wording cleanup

# Redaction Check

- [ ] no token, cookie, credential, or secret
- [ ] no real IP or real domain
- [ ] no private host name or SSH alias
- [ ] no channel ID
- [ ] no raw production log
- [ ] no personal agent name
